title: Result - Andorra
content:
Welcome to Andorra, a picturesque mountain retreat between France and Spain! Enjoy winter skiing, summer hikes and vibrant Catalan culture.
From medieval architecture to cozy villages and delicious mountain cuisine Andorra promises a perfect blend of adventure and charm.

## Unique food tradition
Trinxat: a mix of cabbage and potatoes, often served with pork or sausage.
Andorra's economic activities are mostly centred on services, tourism and the financial sector. Tourism brings in about 8 million visitors per year.

### Local legend or myth
The Cross of the 7 Arms: a haunting symbol of a tragic legend, it tells the tale of a frightened boy tricked by his friends into shooting what he thought was the devil, only to vanish mysteriously. The 7 arms of the cross represent the boys behind the cruel prank, serving as a lasting reminder of their fateful actions.

### Language of the Land
Andorra is the only nation on earth with Catalan as its sole official language.
kilometres of ski slopes can be found in Andorra.
